segments.name: Chemical and Pharmaceutical Manufacturers
segments.description: Manufacturers involved in chemical processing and pharmaceutical production requiring precise pressure and temperature measurement under high pressure, temperature, and corrosive environments.
segments.evidence_text: Chemical processing is a high demand industry. Its processes need to adhere to national and international guidelines. To ensure safe processes, and optimum creation of chemical products, manufacturers utilize a variety of measurement products in their facilities. They are used for pressure and temperature measurement of chemical processes, among others.

segments.name: Oil & Gas Industry
segments.description: Companies involved in the exploration, production, refining, and distribution of oil and gas products that require pressure transmitters for operational efficiency and safety.
segments.evidence_text: By End-Use (Oil & Gas, Chemicals, Water & Wastewater, Food & Beverage, Power Generation, Metal & Mining, Pulp & Paper, Pharmaceutical)

segments.name: Food & Beverage Industry
